questions.stem:
-- How long have you _____ the book?
-- For two weeks.
questions.explanation: how long 提问持续的时间段，需要延续性动词。borrow 是非延续性动词，不能与 for 连用，其对应的延续性动词是 keep。buy->have, borrow->keep, join->be in, begin->be on。

questions.stem: My uncle _____ to Shanghai. He will come back next month.
questions.explanation: has gone to 表示'去了某地还没回来'，后文说'下个月才回来'，说明人还在上海。has been to 表示'去过某地已经回来了'。根据 will come back next month 可知人还没回来，选 has gone to。

questions.stem: I wonder _____ the sports meeting will be held next week.
questions.explanation: 宾语从句表示'是否'用 if 或 whether 引导。句意是'我想知道运动会下周是否会举行'，表示不确定，用 if。that 引导确定的陈述；what/which 需作从句成分，此处从句完整不缺成分。

questions.stem:
Could you tell me _____?
I want to post a letter.
options: A. where is the post office
B. where the post office is
C. where was the post office
D. where the post office was
questions.explanation: 宾语从句必须用陈述语序（主语+谓语），排除 A（疑问语序）。句意是现在要去邮寄，问的是邮局现在的位置，用一般现在时，排除 C/D（过去时）。答案 B 陈述语序+一般现在时。

questions.stem: The girl _____ is wearing a red dress is my sister.
questions.explanation: 定语从句中先行词是 the girl（人），且在从句中作主语（_____ is wearing），关系代词用 who。which 修饰物；whom 作宾语；what 不引导定语从句。

questions.stem: The children were very _____ (excite) about the school trip.
questions.explanation: -ed 形容词修饰人的感受（感到激动的），-ing 形容词修饰物的特征（令人激动的）。这里主语是 children（人），用 excited。类似的：interested/interesting, surprised/surprising, bored/boring。

questions.stem: We should _____ the problem as soon as possible.
questions.explanation: deal with 是固定搭配，意为'处理，应对'。句意：我们应该尽快处理这个问题。类似的常见搭配：look after（照顾）, take care of（照料）, depend on（依赖）。

questions.group_passage:
Last summer, our school organized a weekend camping trip to the mountains. At first, most of us were (8)_____ about sleeping outdoors because we had never done it before.

On the first night, our teacher Mr. Wang taught us how to set up tents. Some students (9)_____ quickly, but my group had a lot of trouble. Our tent kept falling down. I wanted to give up, but my friend Jack said, 'Don't worry. Let me (10)_____ the instructions again.' After reading them carefully, we finally put it up correctly.

Later that night, we sat around the campfire and shared stories. I was surprised to find that even the (11)_____ students in our class became talkative and friendly. The camping trip taught me that working together and being (12)_____ with each other can make difficult things easy.
questions.explanation: 后文说'因为我们从未在户外睡过觉'，第一次做没做过的事情会感到'紧张的'(nervous)。proud 骄傲的、bored 无聊的、angry 生气的，都不符合'从未尝试过'的心理反应。
句意：有些学生很快就成功了（搭好帐篷），但我们组遇到了很多麻烦。succeed 成功，与后面 my group had a lot of trouble 形成对比。changed 改变、returned 返回、refused 拒绝都不符合搭帐篷的语境。
Jack 说'让我再检查一下说明书'。帐篷搭不好时，重新 check（检查/核对）说明书是合理的做法。forget 忘记、copy 抄写、throw 扔掉，都不合逻辑。
后文说'变得健谈和友好'(became talkative and friendly)，形成反差的应该是'最安静的'(quietest)学生。最聪明/最高/最小的学生变得健谈没有明显的逻辑反差。
句意：合作和彼此有耐心(patient)可以让困难的事情变简单。前文搭帐篷时Jack耐心地重新看说明书帮助了大家，呼应 patient。strict 严格、angry 生气、busy 忙碌都不符合'让困难变容易'的主旨。

questions.group_passage:
Have you ever heard of 'plogging'? It is a fitness trend that started in Sweden around 2016. The word 'plogging' comes from the Swedish phrase 'plocka upp' (pick up) and 'jogging'. When people go plogging, they jog and pick up litter at the same time.

Plogging has become popular worldwide because it combines exercise with helping the environment. According to research, plogging burns about 288 calories per half hour, which is more than regular jogging (235 calories). This is because ploggers bend down, squat, and stretch to pick up rubbish while running.

Many cities have organized plogging events. In 2018, over 20,000 people in 100 countries took part in a global plogging day. Participants often share photos of the rubbish bags they collect on social media, inspiring others to join.

However, some experts point out that plogging alone cannot solve the plastic pollution problem. They believe governments should pass stricter laws to reduce waste at its source. Still, supporters argue that plogging raises environmental awareness and encourages people to think more carefully about how they treat the planet.
questions.stem: According to the passage, plogging burns more calories than regular jogging because _____.
options: A. ploggers run faster than regular joggers
B. ploggers carry heavy rubbish bags while running
C. ploggers do extra body movements like bending and squatting
D. ploggers run longer distances each time
questions.explanation: 原文第二段明确说：This is because ploggers bend down, squat, and stretch to pick up rubbish while running。消耗更多卡路里的原因是弯腰、深蹲、伸展等额外动作，对应选项 C。A/B/D 原文没有提到。

questions.stem: The underlined word 'participants' in Paragraph 3 probably means _____.
options: A. people who watch plogging videos
B. people who take part in plogging
questions.explanation: 上文说 over 20,000 people took part in a global plogging day，接着说 Participants often share photos...。前后句主语一致，participants 就是指那些 took part in（参加）活动的人。participant = person who takes part in。

questions.stem: What can we infer from the last paragraph?
options: A. Experts think plogging is useless.
B. Governments have already passed strict laws about waste.
C. Plogging alone is not enough to solve pollution problems.
D. Most people think plogging is just for exercise.
questions.explanation: 最后一段先说 some experts point out that plogging alone cannot solve the plastic pollution problem，又说 supporters argue that plogging raises environmental awareness。综合来看：plogging有价值但单靠它不够（C）。A 说'无用'太绝对；B 说'已经通过法律'原文是'应该通过'；D 无依据。

questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: C. Plogging: Running for a Cleaner World
D. Why Jogging Is Good for Health
questions.explanation: 文章从什么是 plogging 讲起，介绍了它的起源、好处、全球推广和争议。核心主题是 plogging 这种边跑步边捡垃圾的运动，C 最全面概括。A/D 只提到跑步没提环保；B 以偏概全只提了起源地。做主旨题：找涵盖全文主要内容的选项。

questions.group_passage:
Last Saturday, our class held a DIY science fair in the school hall. Each group needed to show a small invention or experiment.

My group decided to make a simple water filter. (17)_____ We used sand, stones, and cotton to build it. At first, the dirty water we poured in still looked brown. (18)_____ After we added more cotton, the water finally became much clearer.

(19)_____ Their solar-powered toy car could actually move forward in the sunlight! Everyone clapped for them.

At the end of the fair, our teacher said she was proud of all of us. (20)_____ I think science is not just in textbooks — it is all around us.
questions.stem: Choose the best sentence for blank (17).
options: A. The most amazing group was Tom's team.
B. We were worried that our experiment had failed.
C. She said we had shown great teamwork and creativity.
D. We watched a video online to learn how it works.
E. Every student had to write a long report about science.
questions.explanation: 第(17)空前说'我们组决定做一个简易净水器'，后面说'我们用沙子、石头和棉花来制作'。中间需要一个过渡，解释怎么学会做的。D'我们在网上看了视频学习它的工作原理'完美衔接'决定做'和'开始用材料做'之间的准备步骤。

questions.stem: Choose the best sentence for blank (18).
options: A. The most amazing group was Tom's team.
B. We were worried that our experiment had failed.
C. She said we had shown great teamwork and creativity.
D. We watched a video online to learn how it works.
E. Every student had to write a long report about science.
questions.explanation: 第(18)空前说'倒进去的脏水看起来还是棕色的'，后面说'加了更多棉花后水终于变清了'。中间应该是看到水没变清时的担心反应：B'我们担心实验失败了'完美承接失败→补救→成功的叙事转折。

questions.stem: Choose the best sentence for blank (19).
options: A. The most amazing group was Tom's team.
B. We were worried that our experiment had failed.
C. She said we had shown great teamwork and creativity.
D. We watched a video online to learn how it works.
E. Every student had to write a long report about science.
questions.explanation: 第(19)空后面说'他们的太阳能玩具车竟然能在阳光下前进！大家都为他们鼓掌'。前面需要引出另一个小组，A'最令人惊叹的组是Tom的队伍'引出了对 Tom 队的描述，衔接自然。

questions.stem: Choose the best sentence for blank (20).
options: A. The most amazing group was Tom's team.
B. We were worried that our experiment had failed.
C. She said we had shown great teamwork and creativity.
D. We watched a video online to learn how it works.
E. Every student had to write a long report about science.
questions.explanation: 第(20)空前说'老师说她为我们感到骄傲'，后面是'我觉得科学不只在课本里'。C'她说我们展现了很棒的团队合作和创造力'是老师话的具体内容，完美衔接'老师说她骄傲'→具体夸了什么→作者的感悟。干扰项 E 与全文主题不符。
